CustomField.formula:
IF( ISPICKVAL( Status, 'New')&&OR( No_Reply_Time_Partner__c >0, No_Reply_Time_Female__c >0, Dialing_Attempts_Number_Partner__c >0,Dialing_Attempts_Number_Female__c >0), "בנסיונות השגה", IF( ISPICKVAL(Case_Status__c, "Payed_Freezing"), "הקפאה בתשלום", IF( ISPICKVAL(Case_Status__c, "UnControlled_Defrost"), "הפשרה לא מבוקרת", IF( ISPICKVAL(Case_Status__c, "Research_Donation"), "תרומה למחקר", IF( ISPICKVAL(Case_Status__c, "No_Conception_HealthDepartment_Transfer"), "אין הסכמה - הועבר למשרד הבריאות",
IF( ISPICKVAL(Status, "Closed"), "סגור",
IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Kit_Sending_Date_Female_IVF__c)) , IF(NOW()-Kit_Sending_Date_Female_IVF__c<=30, "לא חלפו 30 יום", "חלפו 30 יום"), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Kit_Sending_Date_Partner_IVF__c)), IF(NOW()-Kit_Sending_Date_Partner_IVF__c <=30, "לא חלפו 30 יום", "חלפו 30 יום"),"חדש")
)))))))
CustomField.label: Report decision IVF
